short_desc_en: A moving-average crossover baseline retained as a simple trend-following reference.
short_desc_zh: 一个均线交叉基线，用来保留最直观的趋势跟随型参考。

description.motivation_en: This baseline introduces a simple rule-based trend-following benchmark that is structurally different from return-ranking baselines.
description.motivation_zh: 这个基线提供了一个与收益排序类基线不同的、规则更直接的趋势跟随 benchmark。
description.construction_en: It is built from a moving-average crossover style rule and then evaluated in the same portfolio construction and backtest framework as the other factors.
description.construction_zh: 它由均线交叉类规则构造，并在与其他因子相同的组合和回测框架下进行评估。
description.interpretation_en: In the current package this baseline is not competitive, but it remains useful because it covers a classic trend heuristic that many readers will recognize immediately.
description.interpretation_zh: 在当前结果中，这个基线并不占优，但它仍然有意义，因为它覆盖了一个读者会立刻理解的经典趋势启发式。

analysis_note_en: The moving-average rule is kept to make the baseline set feel complete. It is not the strongest rule in the package, but it covers a familiar trend-following reference that many readers will recognize immediately.
analysis_note_zh: 保留均线金叉，主要是为了让 baseline 这组对照更完整。它不是包里最强的规则，但它代表了一个读者一眼就能看懂的趋势跟随参考。
